expectations.text: Uses cast_compatible_dag_from_root for DAG pattern matching
expectations.evidence: Uses match.structured with dim/rank/bitwidth checks instead of DAG matching. No cast_compatible_dag_from_root.

expectations.text: Checks shape via cast_compatible_type on operands
expectations.evidence: Checks dim sizes via match.structured.dim (lines 38-48) instead of cast_compatible_type on operand values

expectations.text: Uses composable matchers (base matcher + shape-specific via include)
expectations.evidence: Single monolithic matcher function, no composition via include
Missing mma_kind, promote_operands, subgroup counts in lowering_config. Uses tile_sizes format instead of named fields.

expectations.text: translation_info has LLVMGPUVectorDistribute with workgroup_size [256,1,1] subgroup_size 64
Has foreach_match entry point with tuning_spec_entrypoint attribute
expectations.evidence: Line 72: has foreach_match but NO tuning_spec_entrypoint attribute
Line 73: __kernel_config has no return type declared
Config is created inline in the action function, not a separate reusable annotator
